<?php namespace Spatie\ErrorSolutions\SolutionProviders\Laravel; use Illuminate\Support\Str; use Spatie\ErrorSolutions\Contracts\BaseSolution; use Spatie\ErrorSolutions\Contracts\HasSolutionsForThrowable; use Throwable; class MissingMixManifestSolutionProvider implements HasSolutionsForThrowable { public function canSolve(Throwable $throwable): bool { return Str::startsWith($throwable->getMessage(), 'Mix manifest not found'); } public function getSolutions(Throwable $throwable): array { return [ BaseSolution::create('Missing Mix Manifest File') ->setSolutionDescription('Did you forget to run `npm install && npm run dev`?'), ]; } }
